name: 7'10"x10' Triangle Ombre Outdoor Rug Beige - Threshold™
description:
Equally suited for both indoor and outdoor spaces, this Triangle Outdoor Rug from Threshold™ brings a stylish sense of intrigue to your space. Constructed of durable, stain-resistant polypropylene, this rectangle outdoor rug features an allover triangle pattern for a modern look.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

If you’re not satisfied with any Target Owned Brand item, return it within one year with a receipt for an exchange or a refund.
